description: Pantella FNV+ — fork of Pathos14489/Pantella focused on Fallout: New Vegas. Adds world-context providers (faction reputation, quest state, SPECIAL/skills, karma, location/time/equipment) for richer NPC dialogue. Multi-engine TTS via xVASynth, OpenRouter/local LLM, ChromaDB memory. FNV-only — Skyrim users should use stock Pantella (beta).
name: Pantella FNV+
